_comment: OPTIONAL manual hardening for loopx on Claude Code. The loopx adapter's runtime is Claude Code's native /loop + the loopx MCP server (added via `claude mcp add` or install.py) + the /loopx command — NONE of which live in settings.json. This file is ONLY the optional should_run PreToolUse gate + statusline. Merge it into a PROJECT's .claude/settings.json (preferred) or ~/.claude/settings.json. Replace <PLUGIN_DIR> with the absolute path to loopx/claude_goal_mode; if your machine has `python` but not `python3`, replace `python3` accordingly. For strong isolation, run Claude Code inside a dev container / VM.
